query: Cybercab production start date Gigafactory Texas 2026
a_issues: Content A includes low-reliability/supporting sources such as Wikipedia, accessory/blog sites, and Basenor. It also contains some internal ambiguity: the featured snippet and several results say production starts in April 2026, while another result says the first unit rolled off in February 2026 and April was the mass-production/official production milestone. That said, this is broadly reconcilable rather than a hard contradiction.
b_issues: Content B likewise relies heavily on low-reliability sources, including a Facebook result, accessory/blog sites, and Basenor. It has the same ambiguity as A: some snippets say production will start in April 2026 at Gigafactory Texas, while another says production began in February 2026 with the first unit, followed by ramp-up from April 2026. This is somewhat inconsistent unless interpreted as first unit/pilot production in February and broader production in April.
reasoning: Both result sets contain the key fact needed to answer the query: Cybercab production at Gigafactory Texas was slated to begin in April 2026, with some evidence that the first unit rolled off earlier in February 2026 and April marked official or mass-production ramp. A and B both include the strongest directly relevant item from InsideEVs stating Musk said production would begin at Gigafactory Texas in April 2026. Neither set clearly outperforms the other on factual completeness or consistency, and both have similar source-quality weaknesses and similar timeline ambiguity. Therefore they enable a correct answer equally well.
